unit.name: Korath
unit.gameplay_identity: Tank calibration unit carrying Titan, Blessed through one decisive combat silhouette.
unit.supernatural_cost: redirected wounds calcify as stone blooms and goldless stigmata while sensation collapses

psychology.core_wound: His public miracle failed at the exact moment everyone trusted him, leaving survivors alive only by transferring their wounds into his body.
psychology.private_want: He wants someone to declare that his suffering made the failed miracle necessary and therefore forgivable.
psychology.primary_fear: If others can survive without his pain, then his disgrace and continuing penance have no purpose.
psychology.survival_strategy: He steals allies' wounds and makes himself indispensable through compulsory suffering.
psychology.villainous_distortion: He converts protection into moral debt and demands obedience from everyone whose pain he carries.
psychology.current_emotional_state: Exhausted shame sharpened into a low accusatory demand.
psychology.emotional_contradiction: Compulsory service versus resentment that the protected can walk away.
psychology.face_direction: Head stays bowed, but one exhausted eye fixes the viewer; mouth and jaw tighten as if swallowing accusation rather than merely grieving.
psychology.pose_direction: The broken yoke crushes his shoulders while one low open hand demands that the viewer accept the debt; giant feet remain planted for interception.
psychology.forbidden_read: No clean saint, heroic tank, radiant paladin, decorative demon, pretty sad angel, passive sorrowful giant, or generic rage monster.

visible_face_evidence.feeling: Current feeling is visible as Exhausted shame sharpened into a low accusatory demand.
visible_face_evidence.want: The visible intent supports this private want: He wants someone to declare that his suffering made the failed miracle necessary and therefore forgivable.
visible_face_evidence.fear_or_concealment: The face visibly guards against this fear: If others can survive without his pain, then his disgrace and continuing penance have no purpose.
visible_face_evidence.active_survival_strategy: Face and posture enact this survival strategy: He steals allies' wounds and makes himself indispensable through compulsory suffering.
visible_face_evidence.villainous_read: The visible behavior expresses this distortion: He converts protection into moral debt and demands obedience from everyone whose pain he carries.
visible_face_evidence.cited_visual_cues: Face cue: Head stays bowed, but one exhausted eye fixes the viewer; mouth and jaw tighten as if swallowing accusation rather than merely grieving. Pose cue: The broken yoke crushes his shoulders while one low open hand demands that the viewer accept the debt; giant feet remain planted for interception.

professional_standard.benchmark_comparison: The immutable Round 6 evidence compares korath directly with approved matte Vellum and all eleven calibration peers at master, face, and exact-96 scales.

critical_dimensions.evidence: Board-observed evidence for korath: A disgraced coercive martyr reads as an adult villainous tank, not a holy hero.
critical_dimensions.benchmark_comparison: Against the approved hard-matte Vellum anchor and the full role-grouped roster boards, korath meets or exceeds the professional floor for audience_and_intent_fit.

critical_dimensions.evidence: Board-observed evidence for korath: Dry stone, bruised flesh, linen, and fracture detail remain materially separated.
critical_dimensions.benchmark_comparison: Against the approved hard-matte Vellum anchor and the full role-grouped roster boards, korath meets or exceeds the professional floor for craft_and_finish.

critical_dimensions.evidence: Board-observed evidence for korath: The crushing yoke dominates; bowed face and chest wound reinforce compulsory penance.
critical_dimensions.benchmark_comparison: Against the approved hard-matte Vellum anchor and the full role-grouped roster boards, korath meets or exceeds the professional floor for coherence_and_hierarchy.

critical_dimensions.evidence: Board-observed evidence for korath: The horizontal reliquary burden is unlike every other roster silhouette and prop family.
critical_dimensions.benchmark_comparison: Against the approved hard-matte Vellum anchor and the full role-grouped roster boards, korath meets or exceeds the professional floor for distinctiveness.

critical_dimensions.evidence: Board-observed evidence for korath: Three silhouettes, definitive master, same-master face, and verified 96px derivative are present.
critical_dimensions.benchmark_comparison: Against the approved hard-matte Vellum anchor and the full role-grouped roster boards, korath meets or exceeds the professional floor for completeness_and_downstream_usability.

critical_dimensions.evidence: Board-observed evidence for korath: The arch-yoke, lowered head, broad feet, and wound survive exact 96px containment.
critical_dimensions.benchmark_comparison: Against the approved hard-matte Vellum anchor and the full role-grouped roster boards, korath meets or exceeds the professional floor for silhouette_and_96px_readability.

critical_dimensions.evidence: Board-observed evidence for korath: Exhausted fixed eye, compressed jaw, bowed load, and demanding open hand show accusatory shame.
critical_dimensions.benchmark_comparison: Against the approved hard-matte Vellum anchor and the full role-grouped roster boards, korath meets or exceeds the professional floor for psychology_and_villain_read.

critical_dimensions.evidence: Board-observed evidence for korath: Blessed disgrace is primary; Titan mass is secondary without armor or competing effects.
critical_dimensions.benchmark_comparison: Against the approved hard-matte Vellum anchor and the full role-grouped roster boards, korath meets or exceeds the professional floor for production_feasibility_and_trait_clarity.

professional_standard.rejection_case: The strongest honest rejection case was tested against the native evidence, derivative lineage, anatomy, trait channels, and roster comparisons and did not survive cross-examination.
professional_standard.excellence_gap: Later production may further refine micro-material transitions, but no gap falls below the professional concept-art floor or weakens the locked identity.

cross_examination.outcome: All decisive claims survived the one permitted cross-examination; no unrefuted blocker remains.
